changes: Added fake GPU VRAM to the normalization fixture for "normalizes Ollama recommendations to local model refs with startup progress" so its expected local/tinyllama:1.1b output is internally consistent with local eligibility rules.
Left the separate "no GPU means local models are not recommended" rejection coverage unchanged; it still has no gpu fixture and still expects no local/tinyllama:1.1b output.
Marked the prior fake-GPU DoneClaim wording as superseded because gate review found it was stale before this fix2 patch.
Captured the required focused normalization test run with EXIT_CODE:0.
Captured the required focused AI panel baseline test run with EXIT_CODE:0.
Captured the required full-suite RED run with EXIT_CODE:1.

commands.scenario: Normalization fixture expecting eligible Ollama local output
commands.invocation: node --test --test-name-pattern "normalizes Ollama recommendations to local model refs with startup progress" 2>&1 | tee .omo/evidence/task-1-fix2-normalization.txt; printf '\nEXIT_CODE:%s\n' "${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> .omo/evidence/task-1-fix2-normalization.txt
commands.binary_observable: Node test runner reports the focused normalization scenario passed after the fixture gained fake GPU VRAM.

commands.invocation: node --test --test-name-pattern "AI panel runs recommendation models in pure text mode" 2>&1 | tee .omo/evidence/task-1-fix2-baseline.txt; printf '\nEXIT_CODE:%s\n' "${PIPESTATUS[0]}" >> .omo/evidence/task-1-fix2-baseline.txt
commands.binary_observable: Node test runner reports the focused AI panel pure-text scenario passed.

commands.scenario: Full Task 1 RED suite for VRAM-safe model validation
commands.binary_observable: Full suite remains nonzero for intended production gaps; the corrected normalization test passes, and the separate no-GPU rejection test still fails because production emits local/tinyllama:1.1b with no GPU.

manual_qa.scenario: Full Node test suite after correcting the normalization fixture contradiction
manual_qa.binary_observable: Nonzero test-runner result recorded as EXIT_CODE:1; artifact shows the normalization test passed and the no-GPU rejection test did not become a contradictory passing local-fallback case.

cleanup.temp_files: No repo temp files added outside .omo/evidence; harness temp directories are registered with t.after cleanup.
cleanup.worktree_scope: Scoped status checked for test/omo-recommend-models.test.js and .omo/evidence/ only; the broader repo was already untracked/dirty.

stale_state.result: New fix2 artifacts were captured after the test edit; stale prior DoneClaim wording was marked superseded.

misleading_success_output.result: Each tee pipeline artifact records PIPESTATUS explicitly: normalization EXIT_CODE:0, baseline EXIT_CODE:0, full suite EXIT_CODE:1.

flaky_tests.result: All three requested scenarios were rerun after the final edit with isolated harness temp homes and bounded child-process timeouts.

malformed_input.result: The full suite still includes the malformed-input validator scenario; current production fails earlier with missing bin/omo-validate-config, captured in the full-suite artifact.

dirty_worktree.result: Scoped git status shows only the allowed test file and .omo/evidence/ path as changed/untracked for this task; no production path was edited.

remaining_classes.result: No additional adversarial class applied to this tests/evidence-only patch.

risks: The full suite is intentionally RED because production VRAM filtering, stale cache rejection, UI text, local routing cleanup, missing validator, and rollback gaps remain.
The rollback test remains acceptable for Task 1 and still uses the PATH fake-validator strategy; sibling validator wiring was not implemented.
